name: Spotlight New
summary: An animated hero spotlight with three layered radial gradients that oscillate horizontally for ethereal lighting effect.
detailedDescription: Spotlight New creates a subtle animated background using three layered radial gradients that oscillate horizontally. The component uses Framer Motion for x-axis animation (0 to xOffset to 0) with configurable duration (default 7s), infinite reverse repeat, and easeInOut easing. Three gradient layers: first (largest, 560x1380px) uses hsla(210, 100%, 85%, .08) to .02 to 0 gradient at -45deg rotation with translateY (-350px default); second (240x1380px) uses .06 to .02 to transparent at 5% translate; third (240x1380px) uses .04 to .02 to transparent at -180% translate. All gradients rotate -45deg for diagonal orientation. Component fades in over 1.5s on mount. Configurable via gradientFirst/Second/Third props for custom colors. This creates ethereal, moving light effect ideal for hero backgrounds where subtle motion adds depth without distracting from foreground content.
purpose: Add horizontal oscillation to background layers
Provide ethereal lighting for hero sections
recommendations: Best for premium landing page sections and hero compositions.
